dialogue.speaker: god
dialogue.englishText: I am God, the God of your father. Do not be afraid to go down to Egypt, for I will make you a great nation there.

dialogue.speaker: god
dialogue.englishText: I myself will go down with you to Egypt, and I will also bring you up again; and Joseph's hand will close your eyes.

dialogue.speaker: jacob
dialogue.englishText: Now let me die, since I have seen your face, because you are still alive.

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: I will go up and tell Pharaoh, and say to him: my brothers and my father's household who were in the land of Canaan have come to me.

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: The men are shepherds, for they have been keepers of livestock; and they have brought their flocks and herds and all that they have.

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: When Pharaoh calls you and asks: what is your occupation?

dialogue.speaker: joseph
dialogue.englishText: You shall say: your servants have been keepers of livestock from our youth even until now, both we and our fathers — so that you may live in the land of Goshen, for every shepherd is an abomination to the Egyptians.
